name: list_children
description: List all files and subfolders within a folder in OneDrive. You can list the root folder's contents or any subfolder by ID or path. Supports pagination with @odata.nextLink for large result sets.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the folder to list. Use 'root' for the root folder, or a specific item ID. Alternatively, use path syntax: /v1.0/me/drive/root:/path/to/folder:/children.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response (e.g., 'name,size,lastModifiedDateTime').

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Sort order for results (e.g., 'name asc', 'lastModifiedDateTime desc').
